title: Phantom Remover
description: This removes all phantoms from spawning in the game.
body:
# PhantomRemover
Sleep is for the weak. Phantoms are for the trash bin.

## 🚫 What does it do?
PhantomRemover is a lightweight, "plug-and-play" plugin that completely prevents Phantoms from spawning on your server.

We all know the struggle: you're building a massive project, you haven't slept in 3 in-game days, and suddenly the sky is screeching at you. This plugin solves that problem instantly without needing to change game rules (like doInsomnia) that might affect other mechanics.

## ✨ Features
Zero Configuration: No config files to mess with. Just drag, drop, and restart.

Performance Friendly: Extremely lightweight. It listens for the spawn event and cancels it—nothing else.

Universal Support: Works on 1.18, 1.19, 1.20, and 1.21 servers.

Complete Removal: Blocks Phantoms from natural spawning.

## 📦 Installation
Download the .jar file.

Place it in your server's plugins folder.

Restart your server.

Enjoy the silence!

## 🔧 Configuration
There is no configuration file needed. The plugin is designed to do one thing and do it perfectly.

## 🛠 Technical Info
Supported Platforms: Paper, Spigot, Purpur
Java Version: Java 17 or higher recommended.
Also supports: 1.21.x
